mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET PJT_NM = #{PJT_NM}, employeeid = #{employeeid}, PJT_BGNG_DT = #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, PJT_END_DT = #{PJT_END_DT}, PJT_STTS_CD = #{PJT_STTS_CD}, content = #{content}, ATCH_FILE_SN = #{ATCH_FILE_SN}, ORG_FILE_NM = #{ORG_FILE_NM}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = #{LAST_MDFCN_DT}, TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{LAST_MDFR_ID} WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC ( PJT_NM, employeeId, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, content, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM ) VALUES ( #{PJT_NM}, #{employeeId}, #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, #{PJT_END_DT}, '대기', 'SYSTEM', #{FRST_REG_DT}, #{content}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN}, #{ORG_FILE_NM} )
mapper.select: SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, employeeid, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, ORG_FILE_NM, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, content FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') AND TB_PJT_APR = #{employeeId}
SELECT DISTINCT employeeid AS employeeid FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND employeeid IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employeeid
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC b WHERE (b.USE_YN IS NULL OR b.USE_YN = 'Y')
AND b.employeeId IN ( SELECT e.employeeId FROM employee e WHERE e.emp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY b.LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (PJT_STTS_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC
